verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Everybody ought to know Everybody ought to know Everybody ought to know who Jesus is.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He's the lily of the valley. He's the bright and morning star. He's the fairest of ten thousand. Everybody ought to know who Jesus is

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He's the Healer of my body He's the Saviour of my soul He's the Holy Ghost Baptizer

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Everybody ought to know Everybody ought to know Everybody ought to know who Jesus is.
